executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Round 2 regression. Frontend prod at http://localhost:3000, backend at http://localhost:4000, WS at ws://localhost:4001. Seed login: admin@gmail.com / admin123. For sign-up tests, append a unique timestamp suffix to email so re-runs do not collide. Always create a fresh session per test; never reuse hardcoded codes. Take join code from the URL ?code=XXXXXX or host header.

CRITICAL VERIFICATION FOCUS for this round:
1. Round 1 found a UX bug where the host floating playback dock appeared active on a fresh empty session even though no track was playing. The product code was changed to ONLY render the playback dock when currentVideoId is set. For TC009 (and any test that lands on a fresh host session without a track playing), assert that the playback dock (play/pause button, progress bar, volume) is NOT present in the DOM at all. The YouTube iframe must also NOT be mounted.

2. Skip any test that requires reading localStorage values directly via UI — that is a harness limitation, not a product behavior. If a test step asks to verify upnext.guest.* keys, mark it blocked and move on rather than failing.

3. For the full-invite-URL join modal test, ALWAYS extract the invite URL from a freshly-created host session view (the page header or the ?code= URL parameter). NEVER paste a hardcoded invite URL like http://localhost:3000/?code=ABC123 — that code is not a real session and the test will incorrectly fail.

ADDITIONAL COVERAGE (please attempt within steps if a relevant test exists):
- Verify the host's "Invite your crowd" Copy Link panel inside /session/[id]/host follows the same Copy Link → Copied → reset state machine (separate from the participant Invite Friends modal).
- After host clicks Stop Session, a participant in the same room should see the "Host ended this session" screen with Go Home and Create Your Own Session CTAs (PRD §5.6 closed state).
- Adding the same YouTube video twice in a session should reject the second attempt as a duplicate (SongAlreadyQueued) with an error toast and no extra queue row.

Other rules: Host auth errors are toast-only — assert toast text, not inline banners. The host dashboard at /host/auth has no Settings, sidebar, Stop Session, queue, or invite link — those live only in /session/[id]/host. Do not assert immediate WS connection-error toasts on first blip (debounced ~1.2s). Allow ~1.5s retry windows for clipboard ("Copied") and toasts. Do not navigate via inert marketing buttons (Features, How It Works, View Demo).
